homepage.title: igm Robotersysteme AG - welding robot systems made in Austria
homepage.description: igm Robotersysteme AG - igm robotic Systems - is an Austrian manufacturer of industrial robot installations, which are especially designed for arc welding applications.

Programming
Outstanding programming techniques with both the K6 programming teach pendant and the offline teaching system
Large work zone
and perfect welding access to seam positions due to an optimal axial geometry
Optimal set up
Optimal set up of all system components permits a reduction in transfer time by up to 30 % for all construction sizes
Hollow shaft
all cables are inside the robot arms using hollow shafts
